sys_script_include.name: AROPCheckSeeder_CMDB

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_include_4d504ea2cf594f148935fb251d851cbd
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>public</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_snc_airop.AROPCheckSeeder_CMDB</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>AROPCheckSeeder_CMDB</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var AROPCheckSeeder_CMDB = Class.create();
AROPCheckSeeder_CMDB.prototype = {
    initialize: function() {},
    getChecks: function() {
        return [{"module":"CMDB","check_name":"Overall CMDB Completeness Score","order":"10","check_script":"(function() {
    var t = new GlideRecord("cmdb_health_scorecard");
    if (!t.isValid()) {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "Required table cmdb_health_scorecard not found", finding: "CMDB Health Scorecard table is not available. Verify the CMDB Health plugin is active." };
    }
    var gr = new GlideRecord("cmdb_health_scorecard");
    gr.orderByDesc("sys_created_on");
    gr.setLimit(1);
    gr.query();
    if (gr.next()) {
        var score = parseFloat(gr.getValue("completeness_score") || 0);
        var actualValue = "CMDB Completeness Score: " + score + "% (from health dashboard)";
        if (score >= 80) return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "CMDB Completeness Score is " + score + "%. Now Assist has sufficient CI attribute data for accurate AI impact analysis and recommendations." };
        if (score >= 60) return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "CMDB Completeness Score is " + score + "% (target: 80%+). Incomplete CI data will cause Now Assist to produce generic rather than environment-specific AI insights." };
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "CMDB Completeness Score is only " + score + "%. Severely incomplete CI data means Now Assist cannot produce reliable AI insights." };
    }
    var gaComplete = new GlideAggregate("cmdb_ci_server");
    gaComplete.addQuery("install_status", 1);
    gaComplete.addQuery("name", "!=", "");
    gaComplete.addQuery("os_version", "!=", "");
    gaComplete.addQuery("ip_address", "!=", "");
    gaComplete.addAggregate("COUNT");
    gaComplete.query();
    var complete = gaComplete.next() ? parseInt(gaComplete.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate("cmdb_ci_server");
    gaTotal.addQuery("install_status", 1);
    gaTotal.addAggregate("COUNT");
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    var pct = total > 0 ? Math.round((complete / total) * 100) : 0;
    var actualValue = "Proxy score: " + pct + "% (" + complete + " of " + total + " server CIs with mandatory fields). Enable CMDB Health jobs for official score.";
    if (pct >= 80) return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Proxy completeness: " + pct + "% of server CIs have mandatory fields populated." };
    if (pct >= 60) return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Proxy completeness: only " + pct + "% of server CIs have mandatory fields (target: 80%+)." };
    return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Proxy completeness: only " + pct + "% of server CIs have mandatory fields. Critical CMDB completeness gap." };
})()","ai_justification":"CMDB completeness is a top-level health indicator for AI data quality. Low completeness directly translates to generic rather than environment-specific AI insights from Now Assist.","remediation_guidance":"Enable CMDB Health scheduled jobs via: All > Configuration > CMDB Dashboard > CMDB Health Dashboard Jobs. Activate Completeness, Correctness, and Compliance Score Calculation jobs. Target: 80%+ completeness. Low completeness translates directly to generic rather than environment-specific AI insights from Now Assist.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CMDB","check_name":"Mandatory Field Population by CI Class","order":"20","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaComplete = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_ci_server');
    gaComplete.addQuery('install_status', 1);
    gaComplete.addQuery('name', '!=', '');
    gaComplete.addQuery('os_version', '!=', '');
    gaComplete.addQuery('ip_address', '!=', '');
    gaComplete.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaComplete.query();
    var complete = gaComplete.next() ? parseInt(gaComplete.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_ci_server');
    gaTotal.addQuery('install_status', 1);
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return { status: 'not_applicable', actualValue: 'No active server CIs found',
            finding: 'No active server CIs found. Mandatory field population cannot be assessed.' };
    }

    var pct = Math.round((complete / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of Server CIs have mandatory fields populated (' + complete + ' of ' + total + ')';

    if (pct >= 80) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of server CIs have name, OS version, and IP address populated. Now Assist has strong CI attribute data for AI analysis.' };
    } else if (pct >= 50) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of server CIs have mandatory fields populated (target: 80%+). Incomplete CI data reduces Now Assist AI accuracy for server-related analysis.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of server CIs have mandatory fields. Critical data gap — Now Assist cannot accurately reason about server infrastructure without name, OS version, and IP address.' };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Now Assist uses Server CI attributes to contextualize incident impact, suggest affected CIs, and generate remediation steps. Missing mandatory fields make AI impact analysis effectively blind.","remediation_guidance":"Run discovery enrichment rules or import sets to populate name, os_version, and ip_address on cmdb_ci_server records. Navigate to cmdb_ci_server_list.do?sysparm_query=install_status=1^nameISEMPTY^ORos_versionISEMPTY^ORip_addressISEMPTY to identify gaps. Target: 80%+ of server CIs with all mandatory fields populated.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CMDB","check_name":"CI Name Consistency","order":"30","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // Use separate queries to avoid OR precedence issues with multiple LIKE clauses
    var suspects = {};

    function collectSuspect(pattern) {
        var gr = new GlideRecord('cmdb_ci');
        gr.addQuery('install_status', 1);
        gr.addQuery('name', 'CONTAINS', pattern);
        gr.query();
        while (gr.next()) {
            suspects[gr.getUniqueValue()] = true;
        }
    }

    collectSuspect('copy');
    collectSuspect('test');
    collectSuspect('temp');
    collectSuspect('COPY');
    collectSuspect('TEST');
    collectSuspect('TEMP');

    var suspect = Object.keys(suspects).length;

    var actualValue = suspect + ' CIs with suspect naming patterns (copy/test/temp)';

    if (suspect === 0) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No CIs with suspect naming patterns detected. Now Assist entity resolution will not encounter false matches from test or copy records.' };
    } else if (suspect < 100) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: suspect + ' CIs have suspect naming patterns (copy/test/temp). These may cause Now Assist entity resolution false matches — review and rename or retire these CIs.' };
    } else if (suspect < 500) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: suspect + ' CIs have suspect naming patterns. Significant naming inconsistency — Now Assist entity resolution accuracy is at risk. Establish and enforce a CI naming standard.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: suspect + ' CIs have suspect naming patterns. Critical naming hygiene issue — Now Assist entity resolution will produce frequent false matches across ' + suspect + ' poorly named records.' };
    }
})","ai_justification":"AI entity resolution matches incident descriptions and alert sources to specific CIs by name. CIs with copy/test/temp naming patterns cause false matches and lead Now Assist to associate incidents with wrong CIs.","remediation_guidance":"Identify and rename CIs with copy/test/temp naming patterns via cmdb_ci_list.do?sysparm_query=nameLIKEcopy^ORnameLIKEtest^ORnameLIKEtemp. Establish and enforce a CI naming standard. Consider retiring test/copy CIs no longer needed. Inconsistent naming causes Now Assist entity resolution false matches.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CMDB","check_name":"CI Owned By / Managed By Population","order":"40","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaOwned = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_ci');
    gaOwned.addQuery('install_status', 1);
    gaOwned.addQuery('owned_by', '!=', '');
    gaOwned.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaOwned.query();
    var withOwner = gaOwned.next() ? parseInt(gaOwned.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_ci');
    gaTotal.addQuery('install_status', 1);
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return { status: 'not_applicable', actualValue: 'No active CIs found',
            finding: 'No active CIs found. Ownership population cannot be assessed.' };
    }

    var pct = Math.round((withOwner / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of active CIs have owned_by populated (' + withOwner + ' of ' + total + ')';

    if (pct >= 80) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of active CIs have an owner assigned. Now Assist can route AI recommendations and escalations to the correct owners.' };
    } else if (pct >= 50) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of active CIs have an owner (target: 80%+). Now Assist AI escalation routing will fail for CIs without ownership data.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of active CIs have an owner. Critical ownership gap — Now Assist cannot route AI-generated recommendations or escalations without CI ownership data.' };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Now Assist AI-driven assignment and routing uses CI ownership to recommend the correct team. Zero ownership population means every AI assignment recommendation defaults to generic logic.","remediation_guidance":"Populate owned_by and managed_by fields via import set from HR or asset management data. Use discovery enrichment rules to auto-assign ownership by IP range or organizational unit. Target: 80%+ of active CIs with ownership populated.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CMDB","check_name":"Operational Status Accuracy","order":"50","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaUnknown = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_ci');
    gaUnknown.addQuery('install_status', 1);
    gaUnknown.addNullQuery('operational_status');
    gaUnknown.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaUnknown.query();
    var unknown = gaUnknown.next() ? parseInt(gaUnknown.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_ci');
    gaTotal.addQuery('install_status', 1);
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return { status: 'not_applicable', actualValue: 'No active CIs found',
            finding: 'No active CIs found. Operational status accuracy cannot be assessed.' };
    }

    var pct = Math.round((unknown / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of active CIs have Unknown operational status (' + unknown + ' of ' + total + ')';

    if (pct <= 5) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of active CIs have Unknown operational status. Now Assist impact analysis will accurately scope to operational assets.' };
    } else if (pct <= 30) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of active CIs have Unknown operational status (target: ≤5%). Now Assist may ambiguously scope impact analysis and include potentially decommissioned assets.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of active CIs have Unknown operational status. Widespread operational status gaps mean Now Assist impact analysis is unreliable — it cannot distinguish operational from decommissioned assets.' };
    }
})","ai_justification":"CIs with Unknown operational status are treated ambiguously by Now Assist during impact analysis. High Unknown rates cause AI to include potentially decommissioned or test CIs in impact scope.","remediation_guidance":"Review CIs with Unknown operational status via cmdb_ci_list.do?sysparm_query=install_status=1^operational_status=Unknown. Cross-reference against discovery data. Target: ≤5% of active CIs with Unknown status. Unknown status causes Now Assist to ambiguously scope impact analysis.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CMDB","check_name":"Overall CMDB Correctness Score","order":"60","check_script":"(function() {
    var t = new GlideRecord("cmdb_health_scorecard");
    if (!t.isValid()) {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "Required table cmdb_health_scorecard not found", finding: "CMDB Health Scorecard table is not available. Verify the CMDB Health plugin is active." };
    }
    var gr = new GlideRecord("cmdb_health_scorecard");
    gr.orderByDesc("sys_created_on");
    gr.setLimit(1);
    gr.query();
    if (gr.next()) {
        var score = parseFloat(gr.getValue("correctness_score") || 0);
        var actualValue = "CMDB Correctness Score: " + score + "%";
        if (score >= 75) return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "CMDB Correctness Score is " + score + "%. CI data is current and accurate — Now Assist AI recommendations will reflect the actual state of infrastructure." };
        if (score >= 50) return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "CMDB Correctness Score is " + score + "% (target: 75%+). Incorrect CI data will cause Now Assist to recommend remediations based on outdated infrastructure state." };
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "CMDB Correctness Score is only " + score + "%. Critical correctness gap — Now Assist AI recommendations are unreliable when the majority of CI data is incorrect or stale." };
    }
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addDaysUTC(-90);
    var gaFresh = new GlideAggregate("cmdb_ci");
    gaFresh.addQuery("install_status", 1);
    gaFresh.addQuery("sys_updated_on", ">=", cutoff.getValue());
    gaFresh.addAggregate("COUNT");
    gaFresh.query();
    var fresh = gaFresh.next() ? parseInt(gaFresh.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate("cmdb_ci");
    gaTotal.addQuery("install_status", 1);
    gaTotal.addAggregate("COUNT");
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    var pct = total > 0 ? Math.round((fresh / total) * 100) : 0;
    var actualValue = "Proxy correctness: " + pct + "% of CIs updated in last 90 days (" + fresh + " of " + total + "). Enable CMDB Health jobs for official score.";
    if (pct >= 75) return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Proxy correctness: " + pct + "% of CIs updated in last 90 days." };
    if (pct >= 50) return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Proxy correctness: only " + pct + "% of CIs updated in last 90 days (target: 75%+)." };
    return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Proxy correctness: only " + pct + "% of CIs updated in last 90 days. Most CI data is likely stale." };
})()","ai_justification":"CMDB correctness measures whether CI data reflects actual infrastructure state. Low correctness means Now Assist is reasoning over data that does not represent the real environment.","remediation_guidance":"Enable CMDB Health Correctness job via: All > Configuration > CMDB Dashboard > CMDB Health Dashboard Jobs. Target: 75%+ correctness. Address top correctness detractors (orphaned, stale, duplicate CIs) identified by the health dashboard.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CMDB","check_name":"Stale CI Rate (90 days)","order":"70","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addDaysUTC(-90);

    var gaStale = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_ci');
    gaStale.addQuery('install_status', 1);
    gaStale.addQuery('sys_updated_on', '<', cutoff.getValue());
    gaStale.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaStale.query();
    var stale = gaStale.next() ? parseInt(gaStale.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_ci');
    gaTotal.addQuery('install_status', 1);
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return { status: 'not_applicable', actualValue: 'No active CIs found',
            finding: 'No active CIs found. Stale CI rate cannot be assessed.' };
    }

    var pct = Math.round((stale / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of active CIs not updated in 90+ days (' + stale + ' of ' + total + ')';

    if (pct <= 20) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of active CIs are stale at 90 days. CMDB data is current — Now Assist AI recommendations reflect recent infrastructure state.' };
    } else if (pct <= 50) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of active CIs have not been updated in 90+ days (target: ≤20%). Stale CI data reduces Now Assist AI accuracy — expand discovery coverage and frequency.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of active CIs are stale at 90 days. Majority of CMDB data is outdated — Now Assist AI recommendations based on this data will be unreliable.' };
    }
})","ai_justification":"CIs not updated in 90+ days are likely to have outdated attributes. Now Assist uses sys_updated_on as a freshness signal -- highly stale CIs are deprioritized but still introduce noise into impact analysis.","remediation_guidance":"Expand and schedule discovery runs to cover all infrastructure segments more frequently. Configure daily or weekly discovery for critical infrastructure via discovery_schedule_list.do. Target: ≤20% of CIs stale at 90 days.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CMDB","check_name":"Stale CI Rate (180 days)","order":"80","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addDaysUTC(-180);

    var gaStale = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_ci');
    gaStale.addQuery('install_status', 1);
    gaStale.addQuery('sys_updated_on', '<', cutoff.getValue());
    gaStale.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaStale.query();
    var stale = gaStale.next() ? parseInt(gaStale.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_ci');
    gaTotal.addQuery('install_status', 1);
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return { status: 'not_applicable', actualValue: 'No active CIs found',
            finding: 'No active CIs found. 180-day stale CI rate cannot be assessed.' };
    }

    var pct = Math.round((stale / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of active CIs not updated in 180+ days (' + stale + ' of ' + total + ')';

    if (pct <= 10) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of active CIs are stale at 180 days. CMDB has minimal ghost records — Now Assist impact analysis will not be polluted by decommissioned assets.' };
    } else if (pct <= 30) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of active CIs have not been updated in 180+ days (target: ≤10%). These are likely ghost records — Now Assist may recommend remediations for non-existent assets.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of active CIs are stale at 180 days. High ghost record rate — Now Assist impact analysis is likely to include significant numbers of decommissioned or non-existent assets.' };
    }
})","ai_justification":"CIs not updated in 180+ days are unlikely to reflect real infrastructure. These ghost records create AI noise -- Now Assist may suggest remediations for CIs that no longer exist.","remediation_guidance":"Flag 180-day stale CIs for decommission review. Work with asset owners to verify each CI. CIs not updated in 180+ days are likely ghost records that cause Now Assist to recommend remediations for non-existent assets. Target: ≤10% of CIs stale at 180 days.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CMDB","check_name":"Authoritative Source Coverage","order":"90","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaAuth = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_ci');
    gaAuth.addQuery('install_status', 1);
    gaAuth.addQuery('discovery_source', '!=', '');
    gaAuth.addQuery('discovery_source', 'NOT IN', 'manual,Manual,Manual Entry');
    gaAuth.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaAuth.query();
    var authoritative = gaAuth.next() ? parseInt(gaAuth.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_ci');
    gaTotal.addQuery('install_status', 1);
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return { status: 'not_applicable', actualValue: 'No active CIs found',
            finding: 'No active CIs found. Authoritative source coverage cannot be assessed.' };
    }

    var pct = Math.round((authoritative / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of active CIs have an authoritative discovery source (' + authoritative + ' of ' + total + ')';

    if (pct >= 90) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of active CIs are discovery-sourced. Now Assist AI recommendations are based on reliably maintained, auto-discovered CI data.' };
    } else if (pct >= 70) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of CIs have an authoritative source (target: 90%+). Manually entered CIs become stale quickly and reduce Now Assist context reliability.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of CIs are from authoritative sources. High manual CI rate means Now Assist is reasoning over data that is likely stale and unreliable.' };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Authoritative source coverage confirms that CI data originates from trusted automated discovery. Now Assist gives higher confidence to discovery-sourced CIs when generating AI recommendations.","remediation_guidance":"Replace manually-sourced CIs with discovery-sourced records by expanding ServiceNow Discovery, SCCM integration, or ServiceGraph Connectors. Target: 90%+ of active CIs with an authoritative discovery source.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CMDB","check_name":"Duplicate CI Rate","order":"100","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var testGr = new GlideRecord('reconcile_duplicate_task');
    testGr.setLimit(1);
    testGr.query();
    if (!testGr.isValid()) {
        return { status: 'not_applicable', actualValue: 'IRE deduplication table not found',
            finding: 'IRE deduplication table (reconcile_duplicate_task) does not exist on this instance. IRE may not be activated — duplicate CI detection is unavailable.' };
    }

    var ga = new GlideAggregate('reconcile_duplicate_task');
    ga.addQuery('state', 'IN', 'Open,open,1');
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var open = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = open + ' open deduplication tasks';

    if (open === 0) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No open deduplication tasks. CMDB has no known duplicate CIs — Now Assist AI context is not split across duplicate records.' };
    } else if (open < 100) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: open + ' open deduplication tasks. Duplicate CIs cause Now Assist to split AI context across multiple records for the same physical asset — remediate these tasks.' };
    } else if (open < 500) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: open + ' open deduplication tasks. Significant duplicate CI issue — Now Assist AI context fragmentation is affecting a large portion of the CMDB.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: open + ' open deduplication tasks. Critical duplicate CI problem — Now Assist AI context is severely fragmented. Bulk deduplication is required before AI capabilities will be reliable.' };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Duplicate CIs cause Now Assist to split AI context across multiple records for the same physical asset. Summarization and impact analysis produce conflicting results when the same CI has multiple representations.","remediation_guidance":"Remediate open IRE deduplication tasks via reconcile_duplicate_task_list.do. Use the Duplicate CI Remediator tool to merge duplicate records. Enable IRE identification rules to prevent future duplicates. Duplicate CIs cause Now Assist to split AI context across multiple records for the same physical asset.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CMDB","check_name":"CI Relationship Coverage","order":"110","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaRels = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_rel_ci');
    gaRels.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaRels.query();
    var rels = gaRels.next() ? parseInt(gaRels.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaCIs = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_ci');
    gaCIs.addQuery('install_status', 1);
    gaCIs.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaCIs.query();
    var cis = gaCIs.next() ? parseInt(gaCIs.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (cis === 0) {
        return { status: 'not_applicable', actualValue: 'No active CIs found',
            finding: 'No active CIs found. CI relationship coverage cannot be assessed.' };
    }

    var ratio = Math.round(rels / cis);
    var actualValue = rels + ' total CI relationships | ' + cis + ' active CIs | ~' + ratio + ' relationships per CI';

    if (ratio >= 5) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: '~' + ratio + ' relationships per CI. Now Assist has rich CI relationship data for AI impact traversal and dependency analysis.' };
    } else if (ratio >= 1) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ~' + ratio + ' relationship(s) per CI (target: 5+). Limited relationship coverage reduces the depth of Now Assist AI impact analysis.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No CI relationships found. Now Assist cannot perform impact analysis without CI relationships — isolated CIs provide zero traversal context for AI.' };
    }
})","ai_justification":"CI relationships are the traversal path Now Assist uses to perform impact analysis. Low relationship coverage limits the depth of AI impact assessments.","remediation_guidance":"Enable Service Mapping and run discovery patterns to auto-populate CI relationships. Manually define relationships for key business-critical CIs via cmdb_rel_ci_list.do. Target: 5+ relationships per CI on average. CI relationships are the traversal path Now Assist uses for impact analysis.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CMDB","check_name":"Relationship Type Distribution","order":"120","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaTypes = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_rel_type');
    gaTypes.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTypes.query();
    var types = gaTypes.next() ? parseInt(gaTypes.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_rel_ci');
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var totalRels = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaGeneric = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_rel_ci');
    gaGeneric.addQuery('type.name', 'CONTAINS', 'Unknown');
    gaGeneric.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaGeneric.query();
    var generic = gaGeneric.next() ? parseInt(gaGeneric.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var genericPct = totalRels > 0 ? Math.round((generic / totalRels) * 100) : 0;
    var actualValue = types + ' distinct relationship types | ' + generic + ' generic/Unknown relationships (' + genericPct + '%)';

    if (types >= 10 && genericPct <= 10) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: types + ' distinct relationship types with only ' + genericPct + '% generic. Now Assist can reason about dependency direction and impact scope using typed CI relationships.' };
    } else if (types >= 5 || genericPct <= 30) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: types + ' relationship types with ' + genericPct + '% generic/Unknown (targets: 10+ types, ≤10% generic). Improve relationship typing for more accurate Now Assist impact analysis.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + types + ' relationship types with ' + genericPct + '% generic/Unknown relationships. Now Assist cannot determine dependency direction or impact scope without well-typed CI relationships.' };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Generic relationship types (Unknown, Connected by) provide minimal context for Now Assist impact traversal. Specific typed relationships allow the AI to reason about dependency direction and impact scope.","remediation_guidance":"Review and replace generic relationship types (Unknown, Connected by) with specific typed relationships (Runs on, Depends on, Hosted on). Service Mapping auto-creates typed relationships during discovery. Specific types allow Now Assist to reason about dependency direction and impact scope.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CMDB","check_name":"Orphaned CI Count","order":"130","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_rel_ci');
    ga.addEncodedQuery('parent.sys_class_pathISEMPTY^ORchild.sys_class_pathISEMPTY');
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var broken = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = broken + ' broken cmdb_rel_ci records (NULL parent/child sys_class_path)';

    if (broken === 0) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No broken CI relationship records found. Now Assist impact traversal has no dead ends from orphaned relationship records.' };
    } else if (broken < 100) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: broken + ' broken CI relationship records. These create dead ends in Now Assist impact traversal — clean up orphaned records.' };
    } else if (broken < 1000) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: broken + ' broken CI relationship records. Significant orphaned relationship issue — Now Assist impact analysis will encounter frequent dead ends.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: broken + ' broken CI relationship records. Critical orphaned relationship problem — Now Assist impact traversal is severely impaired by the volume of broken records.' };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Broken CI relationship records create dead ends in Now Assist relationship traversal. Orphaned CIs provide zero relationship context for AI impact analysis regardless of attribute quality.","remediation_guidance":"Clean up broken cmdb_rel_ci records via cmdb_rel_ci_list.do?sysparm_query=parent.sys_class_pathISEMPTY^ORchild.sys_class_pathISEMPTY. Enable CMDB Health jobs to automatically identify orphaned CIs. Broken relationships create dead ends in Now Assist impact traversal.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CMDB","check_name":"Application-to-Infrastructure Mapping","order":"140","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_ci_appl');
    gaTotal.addQuery('install_status', 1);
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return { status: 'not_applicable', actualValue: 'No active application CIs found',
            finding: 'No active application CIs found. Application-to-infrastructure mapping cannot be assessed.' };
    }

    var gaMapped = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_rel_ci');
    gaMapped.addQuery('parent.sys_class_name', 'cmdb_ci_appl');
    gaMapped.addQuery('child.sys_class_name', 'IN', 'cmdb_ci_server,cmdb_ci_database');
    gaMapped.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaMapped.query();
    var mapped = gaMapped.next() ? parseInt(gaMapped.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((mapped / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of application CIs mapped to infrastructure (' + mapped + ' of ' + total + ' app CIs)';

    if (pct >= 50) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of application CIs are mapped to server or database infrastructure. Now Assist can perform AI impact analysis from application down to infrastructure level.' };
    } else if (pct >= 10) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of application CIs are mapped to infrastructure (target: 50%+). Now Assist AI impact analysis will be incomplete for unmapped applications.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of application CIs are mapped to infrastructure. Now Assist cannot perform meaningful AI impact analysis without application-to-infrastructure relationships.' };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Application-to-infrastructure mapping is the foundation of Now Assist impact analysis for business applications. Without it, AI cannot determine what infrastructure an application depends on.","remediation_guidance":"Map application CIs to server and database CIs via Service Mapping or relationship import sets. Target: 50%+ of application CIs mapped to underlying infrastructure. Application-to-infrastructure mapping is the foundation of Now Assist impact analysis for business applications.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CMDB","check_name":"CSDM Alignment","order":"150","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaBizApps = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_ci_business_app');
    gaBizApps.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaBizApps.query();
    var bizApps = gaBizApps.next() ? parseInt(gaBizApps.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaOfferings = new GlideAggregate('service_offering');
    gaOfferings.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaOfferings.query();
    var offerings = gaOfferings.next() ? parseInt(gaOfferings.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = 'Business Apps: ' + bizApps + ' | Service Offerings: ' + offerings;

    if (bizApps >= 10 && offerings >= 5) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: bizApps + ' Business Applications and ' + offerings + ' Service Offerings defined. CSDM alignment ensures Now Assist is reasoning over the correct data model for AI service impact analysis.' };
    } else if (bizApps >= 3 || offerings >= 1) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Partial CSDM alignment (' + bizApps + ' Business Apps, ' + offerings + ' Service Offerings). Targets: 10+ Business Apps, 5+ Service Offerings. Incomplete CSDM limits Now Assist service-level AI analysis.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No CSDM alignment (' + bizApps + ' Business Apps, ' + offerings + ' Service Offerings). Now Assist is designed to reason over the CSDM data model — without it, service-level AI analysis is not possible.' };
    }
})","ai_justification":"CSDM alignment ensures the CMDB uses the ServiceNow Common Service Data Model, which Now Assist is designed to reason over. Business Apps, Service Offerings, and Technical Services are key AI reference entities.","remediation_guidance":"Populate Business Application (cmdb_ci_business_app) and Service Offering (service_offering) CI classes following the CSDM framework. Target: 10+ Business Applications, 5+ Service Offerings. CSDM alignment ensures the CMDB uses the data model Now Assist is designed to reason over.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CMDB","check_name":"CI Lifecycle Management","order":"160","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_ci');
    ga.addQuery('operational_status', 6); // 6 = Retired (Decommissioned not present on this instance)
    ga.addQuery('install_status', 1);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var mismatched = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = mismatched + ' CIs in Retired status still flagged as Installed';

    if (mismatched === 0) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No lifecycle state mismatches found. Now Assist impact analysis will not be polluted by ghost records from retired assets.' };
    } else if (mismatched < 100) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: mismatched + ' retired CIs still flagged as Installed. These ghost records will pollute Now Assist impact analysis with non-existent assets.' };
    } else if (mismatched < 1000) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: mismatched + ' lifecycle state mismatches. Significant ghost record issue — Now Assist AI impact scope includes a large number of retired assets.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: mismatched + ' retired CIs still flagged as Installed. Critical lifecycle management failure — Now Assist impact analysis is heavily polluted with ghost records.' };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Retired CIs still flagged as Installed are included in Now Assist impact analysis, causing AI to suggest remediations for, route alerts to, and assess impact on assets that no longer exist.","remediation_guidance":"Update install_status for Retired and Decommissioned CIs to a non-Installed value. Navigate to cmdb_ci_list.do?sysparm_query=operational_statusINRetired,Decommissioned^install_status=1. Target: 0 lifecycle state mismatches. Ghost records pollute Now Assist impact analysis.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CMDB","check_name":"IRE Configuration","order":"170","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_identifier');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var rules = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = rules + ' active IRE identification rules';

    if (rules >= 10) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: rules + ' active IRE identification rules. Robust IRE configuration prevents duplicate CI creation and maintains CMDB integrity for Now Assist AI analysis.' };
    } else if (rules >= 1) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + rules + ' active IRE identification rule(s) (target: 10+). Limited IRE coverage increases the risk of duplicate CI creation — a primary source of Now Assist AI context fragmentation.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No active IRE identification rules. Without IRE, every discovery run risks creating duplicate CIs — the primary source of CMDB data quality degradation that impacts Now Assist AI accuracy.' };
    }
})","ai_justification":"IRE identification rules prevent duplicate CIs from being created by discovery. Well-configured IRE means the CMDB stays clean as discovery runs, preserving the single-source-of-truth that Now Assist AI depends on.","remediation_guidance":"Configure IRE identification rules for all key CI classes via cmdb_identifier_list.do. Ensure each class has strong identifier entries (serial number, MAC address, hostname). Target: 10+ active IRE rules. Well-configured IRE is the primary defense against duplicate CI creation.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CMDB","check_name":"CMDB Health Scheduled Job Status","order":"180","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var healthJobs = { completeness: false, correctness: false, compliance: false };
    var jobDetails = [];
    var scheduledCount = 0;
    var totalFound = 0;

    var gr = new GlideRecord('sysauto_script');
    gr.addQuery('name', 'CONTAINS', 'CMDB Health Dashboard');
    gr.addActiveQuery();
    gr.query();

    while (gr.next()) {
        totalFound++;
        var name = gr.getValue('name');
        var runType = gr.getValue('run_type');
        var isScheduled = (runType !== 'none' && runType !== 'on_demand' && runType !== null);
        if (isScheduled) scheduledCount++;

        if (name.indexOf('Completeness') > -1) healthJobs.completeness = isScheduled;
        if (name.indexOf('Correctness')  > -1) healthJobs.correctness  = isScheduled;
        if (name.indexOf('Compliance')   > -1) healthJobs.compliance   = isScheduled;

        jobDetails.push(name + ' [' + runType + ']');
    }

    var coreJobsScheduled = healthJobs.completeness && healthJobs.correctness && healthJobs.compliance;
    var actualValue = totalFound + ' CMDB Health jobs found | ' + scheduledCount + ' scheduled';

    if (totalFound === 0) {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No CMDB Health Dashboard jobs found. Navigate to: All > Configuration > CMDB Dashboard > CMDB Health Dashboard Jobs to enable. Without these jobs, CHK0002210 and CHK0002215 cannot return official health scores.' };
    } else if (!coreJobsScheduled) {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'CMDB Health Dashboard jobs exist but one or more core jobs (Completeness, Correctness, Compliance) are not scheduled. Found: ' + totalFound + ' jobs, ' + scheduledCount + ' scheduled. Jobs: ' + jobDetails.join(' | ') };
    } else {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: scheduledCount + ' of ' + totalFound + ' CMDB Health Dashboard jobs are scheduled and active. Official CMDB health scores are being generated. Jobs: ' + jobDetails.join(' | ') };
    }
})","ai_justification":"<p>CMDB Health jobs produce the Completeness and Correctness scores that quantify AI data readiness. Without these jobs running, CMDB-01 and CMDB-06 cannot return real scores.</p>","remediation_guidance":"Enable all 3 CMDB Health jobs via: All > Configuration > CMDB Dashboard > CMDB View > CMDB Health Dashboard Jobs. Activate Completeness, Correctness, and Compliance Score Calculation jobs. Without these running, CMDB health scores cannot be calculated.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CMDB","check_name":"CMDB Normalization Job Status","order":"190","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // Use separate queries to avoid OR precedence issues
    var found = {};

    function collectNormJobs(keyword) {
        var gr = new GlideRecord('sys_trigger');
        gr.addQuery('name', 'CONTAINS', keyword);
        gr.query();
        while (gr.next()) {
            found[gr.getUniqueValue()] = gr.getValue('run_type');
        }
    }

    collectNormJobs('normalization');
    collectNormJobs('Normalization');

    var total = Object.keys(found).length;
    var scheduled = 0;
    for (var id in found) {
        var rt = found[id];
        if (rt && rt !== 'none' && rt !== 'on_demand') scheduled++;
    }

    var actualValue = total + ' normalization jobs found | ' + scheduled + ' scheduled';

    if (scheduled >= 1) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: scheduled + ' of ' + total + ' normalization job(s) are scheduled. CMDB normalization is running — Now Assist entity resolution will not be split across unnormalized CI representations.' };
    } else if (total >= 1) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: total + ' normalization job(s) found but none are scheduled. Enable scheduling for normalization jobs — without regular runs, the same physical asset may appear under multiple names, splitting Now Assist AI context.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No CMDB normalization jobs found. Without normalization, the same physical asset appears under multiple distinct names and Now Assist entity resolution splits AI context across duplicate CI representations.' };
    }
})","ai_justification":"CMDB normalization standardizes CI names across discovery sources. Without it, the same physical asset appears under multiple distinct names and Now Assist entity resolution splits AI context across duplicate CI representations.","remediation_guidance":"Schedule CMDB normalization jobs via All > Configuration > CMDB > Normalization > Scheduled Jobs. Ensure jobs run at least weekly. Without normalization, the same physical asset may appear under multiple names, splitting Now Assist AI context across duplicate CI representations.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CMDB","check_name":"CMDB Health Workspace Configuration","order":"200","check_script":"(function() {
    var t = new GlideRecord("cmdb_health_scorecard");
    if (!t.isValid()) {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "Required table cmdb_health_scorecard not found", finding: "CMDB Health Scorecard table is not available. Verify the CMDB Health plugin is active." };
    }
    var ga = new GlideAggregate("cmdb_health_scorecard");
    ga.addAggregate("COUNT");
    ga.query();
    var scores = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    var actualValue = scores + " cmdb_health_scorecard records (0 = health jobs have never run successfully)";
    if (scores > 0) return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: scores + " CMDB health scorecard records found. CMDB Health Workspace is configured and health jobs have run — official completeness and correctness scores are available." };
    return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "No CMDB health scorecard records found. CMDB Health Workspace has never run successfully — official health scores are unavailable. Proxy metrics are being used instead." };
})()","ai_justification":"The CMDB Health workspace is the prerequisite for real Completeness and Correctness scores. Zero health_score records means CMDB-01 and CMDB-06 rely on proxy metrics only.","remediation_guidance":"Navigate to All > Configuration > CMDB Dashboard > CMDB View > CMDB Health Dashboard to configure and activate the workspace. Trigger the health jobs to begin populating cmdb_health_score records. The workspace is prerequisite for real Completeness and Correctness scores.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"}];
    },
    type: 'AROPCheckSeeder_CMDB'
};]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-08 20:16:16</sys_created_on><sys_id>4d504ea2cf594f148935fb251d851cbd</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>AROPCheckSeeder_CMDB</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_4d504ea2cf594f148935fb251d851cbd</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-08 20:46:24</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>
